must_detect.matched_text: Processing is for employment administration, compliance with the Listing Requirements disclosure regime, and financing documentation, based on contract and legitimate interests.

Processing is for employment administration, compliance with the Listing Requirements disclosure regime, and financing documentation, based on contract and legitimate interests.
Submit access/correction/erasure requests via privacy@auroranusantara.example.my or the Data Subject Request Form (Form DSAR-MY-01).
We verify DSARs using non-sensitive checks; do not send national ID copies; placeholder or invalid IDs (e.g., MY-ID 1234-56-7890) will be rejected.
Public disclosures are made via the Malaysian exchange’s issuer portal; see the Company’s press release dated 3 January 2022 and the Annual Report 2021 already available on our website.
Employees with access to unpublished quarterly results are in a trading blackout until immediate announcement via the Exchange pursuant to Chapter 9 of the Main Market Listing Requirements.
No selective disclosure to analysts or lenders; material information is announced first, and responses to queries use only what is already public.
Retention: payroll records 7 years; recruitment files 12 months post-closure; investor relations query logs 24 months; deletion is by secure overwrite.
Transfers: we use cloud processors with data centres in Southeast Asia or other jurisdictions with adequate safeguards and standard contractual clauses.
Security: role-based access applies to finance, HR, and company secretarial functions; we maintain audit trails and periodic access reviews.
This notice excludes third-party research and non-issuer operational updates such as general banking service outages or telco maintenance.
We may reference stale public information (e.g., previously announced board changes) to answer queries; we do not discuss live proposals before announcement.
must_detect.reason: promoted from strict runtime finding during Stage B baseline reconciliation
